flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at College of Lake County rose 16% between 2017 and 2020 ($7.5k → $8.7k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at College of Lake County rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.1k → $4.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at College of Lake County rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($12.8k → $14.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at College of Lake County fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5% → 0.0%).
